text.title: instagram-growth Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for instagram-growth. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Use 3-5 highly relevant hashtags per post. Never use 30 hashtags — this pattern triggers shadowban risk.
rule.rationale: Instagram's current algorithm gives no additional reach benefit beyond 5 hashtags. Large hashtag lists are a spam signal and can restrict distribution.

rule.statement: Track Reel reach % (not just views), engagement rate, Story completion rate, and weekly follower growth rate as primary KPIs.
rule.rationale: Raw view counts are misleading for small accounts. Reach % relative to follower count indicates whether Explore distribution is working.
